name: PASHMINA - OYSTER GRAY & WHITE
title: PASHMINA - OYSTER GRAY & WHITE
description:
Elevate your style with this exquisitely crafted reversible pashmina, an essential accessory for elegance and warmth. Perfect for use as a luxurious hijab, a cozy shawl, or a sophisticated evening wrap.
🌟 Features You'll Love:
Intricate Reversible Design: This pashmina showcases a timeless paisley and floral pattern, beautifully woven into the fabric. The double-sided nature offers two complementary color palettes, giving you instant versatility to match any outfit.
Supreme Softness & Warmth: Made from a fine, luxurious blend, this shawl feels incredibly soft against the skin while providing comfortable warmth for cooler days and evenings.
Generous Coverage: The expansive dimensions make it ideal for various styling options, ensuring beautiful draping and full, modest coverage.
Perfect Size: Measures a substantial 2 meters \times 1 meter (approximately 78.7 inches \times 39.4 inches).
Versatile Styling: A must-have accessory that transitions effortlessly across seasons and occasions—from daily wear to formal events.
Material: Luxurious Pashmina Blend
